subject: Tirtouga, a sea turtle-like fossil creature swimming underwater
description: A dark-shelled turtle-like creature moves through an underwater scene. The figure has a hard shell with a dark blue-grey or teal coloring, four flipper-like limbs, and a small determined head. Around it, green seaweed or underwater vegetation sways, and blue-green water fills the background. The creature moves with steady purpose through the aquatic environment. The palette is cool blues, dark teals, and greens.
foreground: dark-shelled turtle-creature with flipper limbs swimming
background: underwater scene with seaweed and blue-green water
